notes: Round 8 covered both the third-place match (France 4-6 England) and the final (Spain 1-0 Argentina). Static commitment: the app locks any player who has played or is playing, so no mid-round captaincy or XI changes were possible; the operator committed a 5-3-2 before the bronze kickoff, benching Kane (rotation read: correct, Kane never played) and starting Medina over a fourth midfielder. Qualification Booster active: +2 to each of the six Spain starters after the 1-0 final win (+12 total). Captain Mbappe returned 17 raw (bronze hat-trick + appearance) doubled to 34 despite France losing. Olise (10, started and scored in the bronze) sat on the bench per the model-guided XI, the round's one clear miss. Recorded in-app net total 95 reconciles exactly with API round points plus booster. Season closed on 513 net points; final global rank 905,675 (from 1,153,720 after the semifinals).
